title: Microsoft considers spinning off Xbox and accelerating release of its flagship franchises
summary: Microsoft executives want new Fallout, Halo and Elder Scrolls games as soon as possible, and are considering a possible split of Xbox.

title: RPG Maker forum closure threatens loss of years of knowledge
summary: The community is mobilizing to preserve the content of the official forums that will be removed in December.

title: Controversy over Tupac's appearance in Stranger Than Heaven sparks debate
summary: The game director defends the inclusion of the rapper and says the controversy doesn't affect him.

title: Modern Warfare 4 brings back early access to its campaign
summary: Activision offers limited-time early access to the Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 campaign.

title: What to play this weekend according to several gaming outlets
summary: Eurogamer, Rock Paper Shotgun, and Nintendo Life publish their weekly game recommendations for the weekend.

title: FromSoftware's largest shareholder pushes to split from Bandai Namco
summary: They seek to maximize the studio's value, even considering forcing out its president.

title: Nintendo's lawsuit against Palworld has little chance of succeeding
summary: Analysts consider the patent legal battle weak and say Nintendo has 'zero chance' of winning.

title: Dutch organization sues Valve over high prices on Steam
summary: They seek millions in compensation, arguing that the platform artificially keeps game prices high.

title: Ubisoft appoints executives after new Ghost Recon fails alpha targets
summary: Development of the next Ghost Recon is facing problems and the company seeks solutions with new leadership.

title: GameStop could lose the best advantage of its rewards program
summary: According to reports, the chain plans to eliminate the benefit most valued by its members.

title: Capcom updates status of Resident Evil 0 and Code Veronica remakes
summary: It is reported that the Resident Evil 0 remake was restarted by the main team, while they adjust the story of Code Veronica.

title: Assassin's Creed creator apologizes using AI, sparking more controversy
summary: Patrice Désilets used artificial intelligence to issue an apology that ended up being even more controversial than the original reason.

title: US regulators approve merger between Paramount and Warner Bros
summary: The merger advances after receiving regulatory approval, creating a new entertainment giant.

title: Death Stranding movie will not adapt the game's story
summary: The director confirms that the film will be set in its own corner of the world and not in the video game's universe.

title: SNK announces Metal Slug Rush and a new mainline entry
summary: The company is preparing an action game for mobile devices and another console title from the classic run and gun saga.

title: Phantom Blade Zero delays its launch to avoid overlapping with GTA 6
summary: The mobile studio moves the release date to avoid direct competition with Grand Theft Auto VI.

title: Forza Horizon 6 on PC warns about save problems
summary: Playground Games asks players to verify the version of Microsoft Gaming Services to prevent loss of game saves.

title: One Piece announces another hiatus, worrying fans
summary: The manga is taking a break, but chapter 1186 is already scheduled for release.

title: Berserk returns after nearly a year-long hiatus
summary: Fans of Kentaro Miura's dark manga finally receive new chapters.

title: Pathfinder studio announces layoffs and budget cuts
summary: The company behind the role-playing game is restructuring due to an economic downturn affecting its workforce.
